criteria_results.description: EditorObject interface in types.ts contains field `status?: 'planned' | 'in-progress' | 'completed'`
PropertiesPanel renders a Select with options 'Planned', 'In Progress', 'Completed' when at least one object is selected
criteria_results.evidence: File client/src/components/editor/PropertiesPanel.tsx, lines 122-140 implements a Select component with the required options and handleUpdate({ status: v as any }) call.

criteria_results.description: PropertiesPanel status Select shows empty/mixed placeholder when multiple selected objects have differing status values
criteria_results.evidence: File client/src/components/editor/PropertiesPanel.tsx, line 124: value={selectedObjects.every(o => o.status === firstObject.status) ? (firstObject.status || '') : ''}. Placeholder is set to 'Mixed status' on line 128.

criteria_results.description: ObjectRenderer renders a status dot only when obj.status is defined; dot colour is gray for 'planned', amber for 'in-progress', green for 'completed'
criteria_results.evidence: File client/src/components/editor/Canvas/ObjectRenderer.tsx, lines 167-176 implements the conditional rendering of the status dot using bg-gray-400, bg-amber-400, and bg-green-500 classes.

criteria_results.description: LayerPanel computes completedCount and totalCount from docState.objects filtering out type === 'path', and passes completedCount/totalCount * 100 to a Progress component
criteria_results.evidence: File client/src/components/editor/LayerPanel.tsx, lines 125-132 compute the counts excluding 'path' types, and line 155 passes progressPercent to the Progress component.

criteria_results.description: LayerPanel progress section is not rendered when docState.layers is empty (no project loaded)
criteria_results.evidence: File client/src/components/editor/LayerPanel.tsx, line 143 wraps the progress section in {state.layers.length > 0 && (...)}.

criteria_results.description: TypeScript compiler finds no new errors in the four modified files (types.ts, PropertiesPanel.tsx, ObjectRenderer.tsx, LayerPanel.tsx)
criteria_results.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit reports only 1 pre-existing error in Canvas.tsx:25, which is unrelated to the changes. No errors found in the modified files.

next_focus: The implementation is complete and verified. No further actions needed for this task.
